name: 14 Cup Tritan Plastic Rectangle Food Storage Container Clear - Figmint™: Stackable, Freezer & Microwave Safe
description:
This 14-Cup Plastic Rectangle Food Storage Container from Figmint™ is perfect for storing leftovers, sauces and more. This clear food storage container's base provides lasting, glass-like clarity, is stain resistant and doesn't retain odors, and the latching lid helps keep food fresh. The container also has a stackable design with slightly tapered edges and a flat lid, and it's both top rack dishwasher safe and microwave safe without lids for reheating.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
